codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly creates the frontend constants file and updates all three services/validators to use the exported constants. All magic numbers have been properly extracted, and the code maintains type safety with proper imports. JSDoc documentation was added for each constant.

summary: PASS - All validation contract assertions fulfilled. Constants file created at src/constants/app.ts with correct values (POLL_INTERVAL_CLAIMS_MS=15000, POLL_INTERVAL_LISTINGS_MS=20000, MAX_QUANTITY=100, MIN_QUANTITY=1). Services properly import and use the constants with no remaining magic numbers. JSDoc comments added for documentation. Type checking and linting pass.
